privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data created via database injection scripts (setup_task.sh). The original exam ('Introduction to Psychology') and the target configuration ('Accessibility_Profile_v2') are correctly seeded into the MariaDB database. The target exam name ('Introduction to Psychology (Accommodations)') and expected password ('AccommodateMe!') strictly match the requirements set out in the explicit task instructions.
